description_long: This object is a rectangular, olive drab device with a curved front face, marked with the words 'FRONT TOWARD ENEMY' and two X-shaped markings. The rear side features warning text and technical information, including 'BACK' and 'BACK M18 AI APERS MINE.' Two thin, metal prongs extend downward, serving as support legs to stabilize the device when placed on the ground. The top of the object has two cylindrical protrusions, likely for detonation or activation, and a central raised section. The overall construction appears to be primarily molded plastic with metal components for structural support and function. The surface is matte and hard, with minimal reflectivity and a utilitarian military appearance.
description: A rectangular, olive drab device with 'FRONT TOWARD ENEMY' on the front, supported by two metal prongs and featuring a matte, hard surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the curved face with 'FRONT TOWARD ENEMY' and two X marks, plus the two support prongs.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile, the depth of the device, and the angled support prongs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays warning text, technical markings, and the attachment points for the support prongs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the thin profile and the prongs, with a clear view of the top protrusions.
